positive: Minimalist geometric woodland creature illustration, featuring a stylized fox and a leaping rabbit, drawn with thick black line art, perfect for a T-shirt print. The style should be a blend of mid-century modern simplicity and Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print aesthetics. The scene is composed in a central, circular vignette against a clean, neutral cream background. Use only highly saturated forest greens, burnt oranges, and deep navy blue accents. Emphasize strong, clean silhouettes and negative space. Flat color filling, high contrast, vector art quality, crisp lines, symmetrical composition, isolated on white background. Concept art style, high detail, commercially viable merchandise design.
